articles.author: Piper Hudspeth Blackburn, Isabelle D’Antonio
articles.title: Seventh US service member killed in Iran war after being wounded in attack in Saudi Arabia - CNN
articles.description: A US service member died after sustaining injuries during an attack last week in Saudi Arabia, the military said Sunday, bringing the number of American troops killed in the Iran war to seven.
articles.content:
A US service member died after sustaining injuries during an attack last week in Saudi Arabia, the military said Sunday, bringing the number of American troops killed in the Iran war to seven.

articles.title: Trump’s ‘roaring’ economy meets a rough start to 2026: What the latest numbers show - AP News
